title: Capten Apex Worker
description: Hindi to Hinglish speech-to-text using Oriserve Apex + MMS forced alignment for per-word timestamps that respect silence.

input.name: Whisper Hinglish model
input.description: Hugging Face model ID. Default is Oriserve Apex for Hindi to Hinglish transcription.

input.name: MMS alignment model
input.description: CTC forced-alignment model with Latin a-z vocabulary (default MMS 300m).

input.name: Alignment language
input.description: ISO 639-3 code for MMS text normalization (hin for Hindi speech + Latin Hinglish text).

input.name: Enable MMS alignment
input.description: Set to false to skip pass-2 alignment (Apex chunk timestamps only).
